caption: A man with short, dark hair and a beard is positioned in a recording studio, wearing large black over-ear headphones and a black long-sleeved shirt. He is seated behind a professional silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm, with a dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam wall as the backdrop. Throughout the sequence, the man's expression shifts as he speaks or reacts. Initially, he looks forward with a neutral expression, then closes his eyes momentarily. He subsequently glances to his right with wide eyes and an open mouth, before returning to a more focused, neutral gaze directed slightly off-camera. The lighting is consistent, and the composition remains a steady medium close-up, focusing on his head and shoulders as he interacts with the recording equipment.
